# SARIF contract test data

`sarif-schema-2.1.0.json` is the official OASIS SARIF 2.1.0 schema with
Approved Errata 01, downloaded from:

https://docs.oasis-open.org/sarif/sarif/v2.1.0/errata01/os/schemas/sarif-schema-2.1.0.json

Expected SHA-256:
`c3b4bb2d6093897483348925aaa73af03b3e3f4bd4ca38cef26dcb4212a2682e`.

The embedded copy keeps contract tests deterministic and available offline.
